# NLModel.ModelType.classifier

**Case**

A classifier model type that tags text at the phrase, sentence, paragraph, or higher level.

## Declaration

```swift
case classifier
```

## Model types

- **NLModel.ModelType.sequence**: A sequence model type that tags text at the token level.

items.description: A sequence model type that tags text at the token level.
items.name: NLModel.ModelType.sequence
